event: Boxer Rising: siege of the Peking legations begins; war declared on the powers
Wuchang rising: the Xinhai Revolution begins
Germany seizes Kiaochow; scramble for concessions begins
Coup ends the Hundred Days' Reform; Cixi resumes control
Boxer Protocol: 450m tael indemnity secured on customs and salt revenue
Battle of the Yalu: Beiyang fleet mauled
Sino-French War: French destroy the Fujian fleet at Fuzhou
Treaty of Shimonoseki: 230m tael indemnity forces massive foreign borrowing
First Sino-Japanese War opens (Battle of Pungdo)
Abdication of Puyi: the Qing dynasty ends; Republic under Yuan Shikai
Deaths of the Guangxu Emperor and Empress Dowager Cixi; child emperor Puyi
Hukuang Railways loan signed; railway-rights agitation in Sichuan
